era: 2002-2006. Post-Hardcore. E=10 -- THE FINAL SIX BEGIN. Peak period: Burn Piano Island Burn (2003) and Crimes (2004). Shoreline, Washington. V2 Records.
key_albums: Burn, Piano Island, Burn (2003, V2 Records, John Goodmanson) -- E=10 peak. Dual vocal chaos established at full scale. Cecilia and the Silhouette Saloon. The Shame.
Crimes (2004, V2 Records, John Goodmanson) -- E=10 definitive statement. 11 tracks, 33 minutes. Love Rhymes with Hideous Car Wreck. Maximum velocity and compositional precision.
This Adultery Is Ripe (2002, Revelation Records) -- pre-V2 peak, transitional.
Young Machetes (2006, V2 Records) -- final studio album before breakup.

theory_nodes.concept: THE FINAL SIX DEGREES: 354 (Blood Brothers, Shoreline, post-hardcore) + 355 (Solger, Seattle, hardcore 1980) + 356 (The Fartz, Capitol Hill, hardcore 1981-82) + 357 (Bikini Kill, Olympia, riot grrrl) + 358 (Sleater-Kinney Dig Me Out, Olympia, KRS) + 359 (Unwound Leaves Turn Inside You, Olympia, KRS). ALL E=10. The engine closes at maximum. The circle begins in Seattle and ends in Olympia.
theory_nodes.description: The Final Six Degrees -- all E=10, Seattle to Olympia close.

theory_nodes.concept: Dual vocal architecture: Johnny Whitney (high-pitched, falsetto-register, surrealist grotesque lyrics) + Cody Votolato (lower-register, rhythmically grounded). Not call-and-response, not harmonies -- simultaneous independent streams occupying the same sonic space. The two voices form a chord of human vocals: dissonant, urgent, structurally deliberate. The collision is the composition. No precedent in the engine's documented Pacific Northwest history.
theory_nodes.description: Dual vocal architecture -- Whitney + Votolato, simultaneous independent streams, collision as composition.

theory_nodes.concept: Crimes (2004): 11 tracks, 33 minutes, John Goodmanson production, V2 Records. The definitive Blood Brothers statement. Song titles announce the aesthetic: Love Rhymes with Hideous Car Wreck, Rats and Rats and Rats for Candy, Teen Heat. Grotesque imagery, extreme velocity, horror-film language deployed with pop-song efficiency. Maximum compositional precision within maximum chaos.
theory_nodes.description: Crimes (2004) -- the definitive Blood Brothers statement at 33 minutes.

theory_nodes.concept: E=10 calibration: three dimensions. (1) Sonic maximalism: dual screaming at extreme pitch range, angular rhythm section, production holding all elements in distinct space. (2) Compositional ambition: tempo changes as deliberate compositional events; melodic clarity moments work precisely by emerging from surrounding chaos. (3) Irreducibility: no precedent in PNW documented tradition; terminal post-hardcore development; requires specific Whitney-Votolato chemistry developed over a decade.
theory_nodes.description: E=10 calibration -- sonic maximalism + compositional ambition + irreducibility.

theory_nodes.concept: Context: 2000s post-hardcore moment (Thursday, Circa Survive, The Mars Volta, Sparta). Refused The Shape of Punk to Come (1998) acknowledged influence on Blood Brothers approach. V2 Records (Richard Branson post-Virgin) provided distribution infrastructure without diluting the music. The Blood Brothers were one of the defining bands of the early-to-mid 2000s independent post-hardcore scene.
theory_nodes.description: 2000s post-hardcore moment -- Blood Brothers as defining band.

cross_references.relationship: Earlier engine entry. Degree 354 = peak period, V2 Records, dual vocals fully realized at E=10.
Next degree. The beginning (1980) follows the peak (2002-2006). The engine's chronological arc collapses into pure energy at the close.
E=10 + E=10 = E=20. Simultaneous detonations. Coastal cliff, summer. Breach triggers colony. Parallel to Blood Brothers dual vocals triggering each other.

sps_pair.pairing_note: E=10 + E=10 = E=20. FIRST E=20 OF THE FINAL SIX. Simultaneous detonations: orca breach (largest single marine mammal acoustic event) + bird colony chaos (largest sustained coastal cliff acoustic event). The Blood Brothers' dual-vocal chaos: Whitney opens the upper register, Votolato fills the lower, together they generate a combined sound neither alone could produce. Same architecture.
